title: Create: Melatonin
description: this is a addon for create that adds cat ears and chloroform.
body:
hi
this is a cat ears, chloroform, definetly legal pills and other stuff addon for create. This mod is actively in development. expect major content updates.
if you like what i do you can support me with one time donations on patreon :3

Making of the High Quality Fabric:

![making quality fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5cefc2a8cefcacbab1a028005cd6b3e1c33fbb1.png)

Making Plastic:

![plastic making ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9ca9cf77c20e6d3a04822089be700b09525e6e.png)

yummy

![dont](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aba82fabd5832e94981a6ce4aaeac219917bf66.png)

Current models are black, red, green, white, blue and orange
here is blue(too lazy to take more photos)

![blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1479f556292ad8fce53ef07a838aa92d1c2dbc32.png)

oh wait i forgot to tell you this mod also adds CHLOROFORM
(sorry i use too many creative engines im lazy)
![a (basic) production line](https://i.ibb.co/67v6Pmf6/Ekran-g-r-nt-s-2026-04-12-125940.png)


also there is throwable stuff including orange sauce which you can use to make your friends furries(with curse of binding :3)

![evil actions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_imagese0a1950bc39e25beba7a4b8d1e50087308a7ec76.png)

Experience the consequences of your actions by being forever trapped in a dark abyss!(please send help ive been here for 3 months)

![oh no ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5023c4e30e27ad645fb261bc6ebe0ecca35ea8b7_0.webp)

![darkness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01ffab5ffd122b80bcf3ebd62c0719ba9897ca0_0.webp)

and a lot more funny stuff to prank your friends with. 
download now and turn your friends to furries and lose all of them!!!!

-made in mc creator 2025.3

tip: you get fur from right clicking a cat with a brush
